summary: The diff implements backend principal-based filtering via a new getMyOwnedGraphData() query in backend/main.mo and updates useGetGraphData in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to call it with a principal-aware cache key. However, REQ-2 explicitly requires updating getGraphData() in frontend/src/pages/GraphView.tsx and frontend/src/pages/TreeView.tsx directly, and neither of those files appears in the modified files list. Additionally, the immutable-path constraint forbids modifying files under frontend/src/hooks/, yet useQueries.ts was modified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update getGraphData() in both frontend/src/pages/GraphView.tsx and frontend/src/pages/TreeView.tsx to call the updated backend query that filters by caller/principal.
missing_requirements.reason: Neither GraphView.tsx nor TreeView.tsx appears in the list of modified files. The change was routed through the shared hook instead of the page files named in the requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module backend/migration.mo was added performing an identity no-op migration.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not request a migration module. The constraint states the persistent data schema and stable state must not be altered, and no migration file was requested.

hallucinated_features.description: frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts was modified to add buildGraphDataFromOwned helper and OwnedGraphData import.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request constraint explicitly states files under frontend/src/hooks/ are immutable paths and must not be modified.
